title: Pinexio - Documentation Template
summary: Pinexio - Documentation Template is a Documentation reference with verified Next.js codebase, App Router structure, dashboard shell patterns. Verdict: valid.

selectedFiles.excerpt:
PINEXIO

Pinexio is a modern, customizable documentation template built for Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS 4, and MDX. It makes creating, managing, and presenting your project documentation effortless.

## Why Pinexio? - **Customizable UI** 🌈: Tailor the design to your needs with light/dark themes and minimal UI libraries. - **MDX Support** 📚: Write rich, interactive documentation with JSX components. - **Automatic Content Indexing** 🔍: Thanks to Contentlayer, MDX pages are automatically indexed and searchable. - **Zero Setup Hassle** 🚀: Add an MDX file to `/docs`, and it’s instantly live. ## Key Technologies - **Next.js 15** for SEO-friendly, performant documentation. - **Tailwind CSS 4** for responsive design. - **MDX** to blend documentation with React components. - **Contentlayer** for seamless content management. ## Get Started 1. Clone the repo. 2. Add your documentation as MDX files in the `/docs` folder. 3. Start building! ## Links - [View Demo](https://pinexio.vercel.app) - [GitHub Repo](https://github.com/sanjayc208/pinexio) --- ## 🚀 Deploy to Vercel in Seconds Want to get your Next.js app live with zero hassle? Vercel, built by the creators of Next.js, makes deployment a breeze! Check out the [Next.js deployment guide](https://nextjs.org/docs/deployment) for all the details and tips on how to deploy like a pro. Ready to go live? Click the button below and deploy your app in just a few clicks! 🔥 [![Deploy with Vercel](https://vercel.com/button)](https://vercel.com/new/clone?repository-url=https://github.com/sanjayc208/pinexio) _Pinexio is open-source and free to use. Happy documenting!_ 🚀

{
  "name": "documentation-template-nextjs",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "author": "Sanjay Rajeev",
  "license": "MIT",
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/sanjayc208/pinexio/issues"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "build:content": "contentlayer2 build",
    "format": "prettier --write .",
    "prepare": "husky"
  },
  "lint-staged": {
    "*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,json,css,md, mdx}": [
      "prettier --write",
      "eslint --fix"
    ]
  },
  "keywords": [
    "nextjs",
    "documentation",
    "template",
    "docs",
    "nextjs-template",
    "static-site",
    "mdx",
    "documentation-template",
    "nextjs-docs",
    "nextjs-starter"
  ],
  "dependencies": {
    "@emotion/is-prop-valid": "^1.3.1",
    "@radix-ui/themes": "^3.2.1",
    "@types/mdx": "^2.0.13",
    "class-variance-authority": "^0.7.1",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "contentlayer2": "0.5.4",
    "date-fns": "^4.1.0",
    "framer-motion": "^12.5.0",
    "gray-matter": "^4.0.3",
    "lucide-react": "^0.476.0",
    "next": "15.2.7",
    "next-contentlayer2": "0.5.4",
    "next-themes": "^0.4.4",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "react-fox-toast": "^1.10.15",
    "react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.6.1",
    "rehype-highlight": "^7.0.2",
    "rehype-slug": "^6.0.0",
    "remark-code-import": "^1.2.0",
    "remark-gfm": "^4.0.1",
    "remark-slug": "^8.0.0",
    "tailwind-merge": "^3.0.2",
    "tailwindcss-animated": "^2.0.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@eslint/eslintrc": "^3",
    "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.0.13",
    "@types/node": "^20",
    "@types/react": "^19",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19",
    "@types/react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.5.13",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.20",
    "concurrently": "^9.1.2",
    "eslint": "^9",
    "eslint-config-next": "15.2.0",
    "husky": "^9.1.7",
    "lint-staged": "^15.5.0",
    "postcss": "^8.5.3",
    "tailwindcss": "^4.1.3",
    "typescript": "^5"
  }
